feed.title: Journal of Latin Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of Latin Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Source preverbs and motion verbs in Latin. A quantitative approach toab-andex-
entry.summary: Authors: Andrea Farina DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2025-2009 Pages: Page range: 113-150

entry.title: Collocations as motivators of new verb meanings: the case ofponereandagere
entry.summary: Authors: Mª Isabel Jiménez Martínez, Iván López Martín DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2025-2008 Pages: Page range: 151-173

entry.title: Rethinking subjecthood: non-canonical subjects in impersonal predicates in early Latin
entry.summary: Authors: Francisca Toro Varela DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2025-2007 Pages: Page range: 175-209

entry.title: Durocortorum Vulgare:linguistic change and cultural integration in the non-standard Latin inscriptions of Rheims
entry.summary: Authors: Lothar Willms DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/joll-2025-2006 Pages: Page range: 211-235
